name: Confederation of Estonian Trade Unions
description: umbrella organization of Estonian trade unions

name: Estonian Food Bank
description: The Estonian Food Bank serves to share food with deprived people, food that otherwise would have been destroyed. In short, the food bank brings food from places where it is in surplus to places where there is need. The Estonian Food Bank has a clear mission: to create solidarity between human beings and responsibility for the weakest.. type: foodbank. curated by: Mondo

name: Estonian Green Movement
description: The Estonian Green Movement is a non-profit organisation for environmental protection the aim of which is to improve the environmental situation in Estonia and to guide the society to sustainable, green thinking.. type: sse_education;ngo. curated by: Mondo

name: Estonian Institute of Human Rights
description: Estonian Institute of Human Rights aims to collect, systematize, analyze, and forward information regarding human rights, to inform the society on the given topics, and to make suggestions for better protection of human rights in Estonia as well as in the World.. type: ngo. curated by: Mondo

name: Peipsi Center for Transboundary Cooperation
description:
Peipsi Center for Transboundary Cooperation works since 1994 in the field of global and environmental education; sustainable local resources management and border research topics.
Their focus is Lake Peipsi/Chudskoe region in the Estonian-Russian border area, but they have implemented several development cooperation projects in Eastern Partnership and Central Asian countries.. type: development_cooperation;sse_education;other_education. curated by: Mondo
